issue_title: sparse_csr bfloat16 matrix multiplication backward is 10x slower than float16
surface_reasoning: Priority 2: labeled `module: performance` + `module: cuda` + `module: sparse` + `module: bfloat16`. Title: 'sparse_csr bfloat16 matrix multiplication backward is 10x slower than float16' — concrete 10x dtype performance disparity in CUDA sparse matmul backward. Domain relevance: sparse CSR matmul backward on CUDA dispatches to cuSPARSE; the bf16 vs fp16 gap indicates a missing optimized cuSPARSE kernel or wrong dtype dispatch path.
